analysis: The project is a test website with a focus on black holes, as indicated by the event.json file. The current UI files (HTML, CSS, JS) need to be updated to reflect a black hole theme with animated slides and pages. The existing to-dos suggest that the HTML and CSS files are incomplete and need to be enhanced with black hole visuals, animations, and a cosmic theme. The JavaScript file also requires updates to ensure proper functionality for the animated slides and mobile menu.

improvements.description: Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including event listeners for the new buttons and mobile menu toggle functionality.
